name: per_team_pass_play with multi-year scope AND year split (no wrap CTE)
description: Negative regression: with a year split active, the outer query row grain is (pid, year) and the standard (pid)-grain numerator + (off, year)-grain denominator + per-year team-attribution join already produces correct rates. The wrap CTE must NOT fire in this case; this fixture pins that contract.
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023,2024,2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "rate_aggregate_0bf0e2a56abd" as materialized (select "nfl_games"."year", nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_eaf3b8abff50 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, "nfl_games"."year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_0bf0e2a56abd.m_eaf3b8abff50) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25" on "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "rate_aggregate_0bf0e2a56abd" on "rate_aggregate_0bf0e2a56abd"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_aggregate_0bf0e2a56abd"."year" = "player_years"."year" where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
